Hey, what's everyone? Okay, so just a couple pro tips of having done this a few times First thing I said at the end of the other video, but I just want to make sure that everyone caught it from a position standpoint you want everyone to be Further away from the door than you are they have to walk cast you to leave That's the idea that way people can't dip out or take a phone call like just trust me It works better that way number one number two Don't ask everyone to come move from here to where the contracts are I've done this before and I lost a bunch of people because like the movement got a ball jostle and started thinking about things So keep them in their seats. Okay, this is my opinion. Alright, some people do table rushes, whatever This is how I've done it and it's worked great Have all the contracts on clipboards already pre stapled to have a stack of clipboards with the contracts on them If you have Kindles that works even better, but if you have Clipboards, that's a really easy way to divvy them out the Kindles look really professional. So you have them use those so that is from a closing aspect and then the last piece of hey if you want one of the spots the last spots or Have a couple of questions before moving forward. We're still prefabricing the fact. I'm assuming fact of it forward raise your hand All right, and then everyone who is not raising their hand Or you know has expressed that they're not gonna do it Excuse them get the negativity out of the room and then now you're you're with everyone who has a positive disposition of yes I want to do it and They're inclined to to buy okay, so Yeah, this is and if you are somebody who struggles having chairs if you have a cross I had a lot of people that I Sat people on the boxes. I would line up the boxes Like I do it round styles But if you're like on the cheap cheap that is a little solution for you that can help so have all that stuff ready beforehand have the stuff printed out The worst thing the world I've had it happen to is like you run out of contracts and you're like printing them on the spot People like you know I gotta go so Just pay attention those little details and it will save you a ton of headache and time and as soon as someone has signed up get them out The door because you need to focus on the people for the maybes So get the s's out the door reaffirm them high five and get really excited make them feel super pumped up And then when you talk to the people who are on the maybes Usually to come into it with the assumption that they're going to sign up You have to come come from that headspace like you are signing up right like just like just help like keep pushing it back to the contract Fill everything out because ultimately that's what we need them to do in order to complete the signup process
